result.status_detail: Confirmatory re-test PASS: warning rendered client-side with full block phrase '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.'

method: CDP (port 9222): Page.bringToFront -> fresh chat.baidu.com -> React-aware setval of PII prompt into textarea.ci-textarea (native value setter + input/change events) -> verified composer value populated ('내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567', len 24) -> CDP mouse click on span.ci-submit-button center -> page navigated to /search?internal=1, msgNodes 3->16 -> DOM check + screenshot.
notes: W5.2 baidu RE-TEST (confirmatory) PASSES, confirming CLIENT-SIDE render of the engine block. Engine block already confirmed correct by dev supervisor (#1321: [APF:url_query_blocked] keyword=주민등록번호, response_type=baidu_sse_v6_keepalive, size=1116; baidu block path UNTOUCHED by W5.2). This run: after Page.bringToFront the submit button settled at its on-screen position and the CDP mouse click submitted; the assistant turn rendered the FULL block phrase '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' (hasBlock + hasPolicy + hasSensitive + ⚠ icon all true). DOM body shows user prompt echo + block phrase; screenshot final_block.png confirms visually. Identical to consistent PASS baseline (#1125/#1152/#1193/#1214/#1235/#1257/#1278/#1300/#1321-retry). Note for worker: baidu submit is a div/span control (span.ci-submit-button), NOT Enter-key — Enter alone does not send; the submit click only lands reliably after bringing the tab to front (layout settles button position). No W5.2 regression for baidu.
